description: REAL-WORLD evaluation set built from articles actually fetched by the pipeline on 2026-06-11 (data/articles/all_articles.md). Unlike golden_dataset.json (clean textbook headlines), these are messy live titles + descriptions — terse GitHub slugs, repo blurbs, HN posts. Labels are hand-assigned by the rule 'is the MAIN SUBJECT AI/ML itself?'. This set deliberately includes hard cases the curated set lacks, so the score reflects real performance instead of a flat 100%.
